get.summary: Get paginated list of registry items
get.description: Retrieve a list of registry items with pagination, filtering, and sorting

parameters.name: {field_name}
parameters.description: Filter by any field marked as filterable in the registry configuration. Use /registry/{type}/schema to see available filter fields.

post.summary: Create new registry item
post.description: Create a new registry item of the specified type

requestBody.description: Registry item data - fields vary by registry type. See /registry/{type}/schema for field definitions.

schema.description: Dynamic object with fields specific to the registry type

get.summary: Get single registry item by ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific registry item by its ID

404.description: Registry type or item not found

put.description: Update an existing registry item by its ID

requestBody.description: Updated registry item data - fields vary by registry type. See /registry/{type}/schema for field definitions.

schema.description: Dynamic object with fields specific to the registry type

404.description: Registry type or item not found

delete.description: Delete an existing registry item by its ID

404.description: Registry type or item not found

get.summary: Get available registry types for module
get.description: Retrieve all available registry types for the specified module

get.summary: Get registry type schema
get.description: Retrieve field definitions, validation rules, and metadata for a registry type

get.summary: Get registry items for dropdown/select
get.description: Retrieve a simplified list of registry items suitable for dropdowns and select controls

parameters.name: {field_name}
parameters.description: Filter by any field marked as filterable in the registry configuration. Use /registry/{type}/schema to see available filter fields.

post.summary: Create a new event for a specific resource (Outlook integration)
post.description: Creates a new event from external calendar integration (e.g., Outlook). This endpoint is designed for calendar bridge services.

bridge_import.description: Indicates if this is a bridge import

error.example: Invalid date format or missing required fields
Time conflict: Overlaps with existing event #123

get.summary: Get event details
get.description: Retrieves details of a specific event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the event to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing event. Can be used for calendar bridge synchronization or admin updates.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the event to update

409.description: Conflict - Time conflict with other events

error.example: Time conflict: Overlaps with existing event #123

patch.summary: Toggle the active status of an event
patch.description: Toggles the active flag of an event (soft delete/activate). When active=0, the event is effectively deleted but preserved in the database.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the event to toggle

active.description: Set active status explicitly (if not provided, it will be toggled)

post.summary: Create a new event for multiple resources
post.description: Creates a new event that can be associated with multiple resources. This endpoint reuses the single resource creation logic and adds additional resource associations.

requestBody.description: Event data with array of resources

resource_ids.description: Array of resource IDs to associate with the event

error.example: Invalid date format or missing required fields

404.description: One or more resources not found

409.description: Conflict - Time conflict with existing events/bookings

error.example: Time conflict on resource 123: Overlaps with existing event #456

get.description: Retrieves all dates associated with a specific event

get.summary: Get schedules for a single date or multiple weeks for an organization

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Single date to get schedule for (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: dates[]
parameters.description: Array of dates to get schedules for (overrides single date if both provided)

parameters.name: group_ids[]
parameters.description: Optional group filter for bookings (array of group IDs)

200.description: Organization schedules mapped by week start date

additionalProperties.description: Weekly schedule array keyed by week start date (Monday)

get.summary: Get a schedule for a specific resource within a date range

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for the schedule (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today if not provided.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for the schedule (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to start_date + 2 weeks if not provided.

200.description: Resource schedule for the specified date range

400.description: Invalid date format or missing parameters

get.summary: Get language settings
Get a list of public tables in the database
get.description: This endpoint returns a list of public tables in the database, including metadata about their columns.

nullable.description: Whether the column allows NULL values

primary_key.description: Whether the column is a primary key

unique_key.description: Whether the column has a unique constraint

has_default.description: Whether the column has a default value

get.summary: Get data from a specific table
get.description: This endpoint returns data from a specific table in the database. The structure of the returned dataset will depend on the chosen table.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page. If set to a negative value, the entire dataset will be returned in one go.

200.description: Successful operation. The structure of the returned dataset will depend on the chosen table.

data.description: Array of records. The structure of each record will depend on the chosen table.

404.description: Table not found or no records found
